base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of town_corneria_castle — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Corneria Castle — opening King NPC location. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
